title: P4 — Command palette + slash execution + mouse + timeline + toasts
description: Palette+fuzzy overlay, CommandHandler wiring slash commands into the TUI, SGR mouse scroll + click-to-expand, animated orchestrator timeline, transient toasts.
acceptance_criteria: palette, history, scrollback, timeline, and toasts all drive correctly by hand at 80x24 and 120x40 without layout breakage.
notes: Code complete; swift build clean (zero warnings) + 104 tests pass; AWAITING owner MANUAL verification — this is a no-tests epic that verifies by build + hands-on, and the interactive UI hasn't been driven yet.

title: P5 — Epic polish (graphics deferred)
description: displayWidth CJK/emoji/combining, gradient startup wordmark, 4 theme presets + /theme, color-depth degradation audit, --no-tui precedence.
acceptance_criteria: full manual session across color/graphics tiers; graphics gracefully absent on Terminal.app; --no-tui forces line mode.
notes: Code complete; swift build clean (zero warnings) + 104 tests pass; AWAITING owner MANUAL verification — this is a no-tests epic that verifies by build + hands-on, and the interactive UI hasn't been driven yet.

title: P3 — Tool tree + syntax diffs + approval card + tasks (set_tasks tool)
description: connected tool tree w/ timers, Highlight (swift/shell/json/diff) + diffView, real y/n/a approval card, task row + new set_tasks tool.
acceptance_criteria: tool run/ok/error states render; colored syntax diff shows; approving mid-turn works and a persists for that tool.
notes: Code complete; swift build clean (zero warnings) + 104 tests pass; AWAITING owner MANUAL verification — this is a no-tests epic that verifies by build + hands-on, and the interactive UI hasn't been driven yet.

title: P2 — MVU core + HUD + Theme + animation
description: TUIModel/Msg/update(pure), renderFrame+HUD, ScreenRenderer diff, TUIApp loop, TUISink, Metrics, Theme+sgr/gradient, frame clock + widgets; idle 0% CPU.
acceptance_criteria: stream a real turn: HUD animates live, input stays fixed, idle CPU near 0; acode -p and piped stdout remain line-mode with no escape codes.
notes: Code complete; swift build clean (zero warnings) + 104 tests pass; AWAITING owner MANUAL verification — this is a no-tests epic that verifies by build + hands-on, and the interactive UI hasn't been driven yet.

title: P1 — Terminal + KeyDecoder + Capabilities
description: Terminal (raw/alt-screen/TIOCGWINSZ/triple-restore defer+atexit+sigaction; ISIG off; off-main readLoop), KeyEvent+KeyDecoder, Capabilities.detect, --tui/--no-tui flag.
acceptance_criteria: kill -TERM mid-session leaves a clean terminal; capabilities detected correctly under Terminal.app, iTerm, kitty, and a pipe.
notes: Code complete; swift build clean (zero warnings) + 104 tests pass; AWAITING owner MANUAL verification — this is a no-tests epic that verifies by build + hands-on, and the interactive UI hasn't been driven yet.
close_reason: P1 Terminal/KeyDecoder/Capabilities complete; swift build clean (zero warnings) + 104 tests pass; code-critic reviewed (signal-restore + readLoop findings fixed); owner signed off.

title: P0 — Render seam: RenderSink protocol + async approve
description: Extracted RenderSink; Renderer conforms; approve widened to async through RenderSink + ToolRegistry.execute; Agent/Orchestrator/runOneShot/runCancellable take any RenderSink. Zero visible change.
acceptance_criteria: swift build green; existing suite still compiles and passes; REPL behaves identically.
close_reason: Render seam complete; zero visible change; fully covered by the existing 104-test suite, swift build clean.

title: Epic TUI — alternate-screen UI (HUD + animations)
description: v2 feature: an opt-in (--tui) full alternate-screen terminal UI for acode. Consciously lifts the plan.md §A/§G no-TUI non-goal (owner decision 2026-06-06). Pure-Swift raw-ANSI MVU with ZERO new dependencies (honors invariant 4; SwiftTUI/ncurses ruled out). Chosen look: Top HUD strip (model · context gauge · tokens · tok/s · cost · elapsed) made epic via a truecolor theme, an animation clock, syntax-highlighted diffs, a command palette, an orchestrator timeline, and an optional kitty/iTerm/sixel graphics tier. Line mode stays the non-TTY/-p fallback. NO new tests (owner preference): verify via build + manual. Full design in TUI_EPIC_PLAN.md (base architecture in TUI_PLAN.md). Est ~2,700 LOC across ~15 files; usable at P0-P3 (~1,700).

title: P5 — Tests
description: Round-trip fidelity, B2 pairing preserved across save/load, store list/load. Depends on: P1, P2, P3, P4.

title: P6 — Docs: record v2 scope decision
description: Record the v2 scope decision in plan.md §G: session persistence is lightweight JSON files, not a DB. Depends on: nothing (can be done anytime).

title: P4 — One-shot flags
description: --continue (resume last) and --resume <id>. Depends on: P1, P2.

title: P2 — Session store
description: Persist/load sessions as JSON under ~/.config/acode/sessions/<id>.json; atomic writes; list/lookup. Reuse atomic/surgical-write pattern from saveApprovals. Depends on: P1.

title: P3 — REPL commands
description: /save [name], /resume [name|last], /sessions (list); optional auto-save on /quit. Depends on: P1, P2.

title: P1 — Serialize/restore Conversation
description: Encode/decode the message history plus metadata (session id, title, model, timestamp). Message is already Codable. Preserve invariant B2 (never split a tool-call/tool-result pair). Depends on: nothing.

title: Session persistence (save/resume conversations)
description: v2 feature for acode: save and resume conversations as lightweight JSON files (NOT a database). Deliberate expansion beyond v1 — plan.md §G lists 'session databases' as excluded, so this epic also covers recording the scope decision. Hard constraint: serialization MUST preserve tool-call/tool-result pairing (invariant B2). Reuse the atomic/surgical-write pattern already used by saveApprovals in Config.swift.

title: DEFERRED — optional kitty/iTerm/sixel graphics tier
description: Capability-gated inline tok/s charts; deferred by owner; Unicode sparkline always stands in.

title: Docs — update plan.md §A/§G lifted no-TUI non-goal
description: §A/§G now point to TUI_PLAN.md/TUI_EPIC_PLAN.md per owner decision 2026-06-06.
close_reason: plan.md §A/§G updated to point at TUI_PLAN.md/TUI_EPIC_PLAN.md; verifiable doc edit.

title: Re-derive parked TUI (CommandHandler, TaskTool, runTUISession, reverted tests, remove Package.swift excludes)
description:
The TUI epic's post-P0 work (16 source files + 1 test, listed below) is currently EXCLUDED from the build via Package.swift (per the commit(2/5) parking comment). The files are on disk and tracked in git @ commit 45c1d76, but do not compile. The goal of this bead is to (1) remove the Package.swift `exclude:` lines, (2) restore the missing pieces of the TUI epic, and (3) re-derive anything that needs re-deriving from the current engine baseline.

PARKED SOURCE FILES (16, in Sources/acode/, excluded by Package.swift):
  - Capabilities.swift
  - DiffView.swift
  - GUISink.swift
  - Highlight.swift
  - KeyDecoder.swift
  - KeyEvent.swift
  - Metrics.swift
  - Palette.swift
  - ScreenRenderer.swift
  - SpikeApp.swift
  - Terminal.swift
  - Theme.swift
  - TUIApp.swift
  - TUIModel.swift
  - TUISink.swift
  - TUIView.swift

PARKED TEST (1, in Tests/acodeTests/, excluded by Package.swift):
  - GUISinkTests.swift

KNOWN MISSING PIECES (need to be re-derived from surviving usage; verbatim originals were lost in the 2026-06-07 working-tree wipe):
  - CommandHandler.swift — TUIApp.swift has `private let commandHandler: CommandHandler` (line 45) and `commandHandler: CommandHandler,` in its init (line 73); TUIModel.swift calls `CommandHandler.runOrchestrator(...)` (line 269). Signature + runOrchestrator() method name are recoverable; the body must be re-derived.
  - TaskTool.swift — referenced in the TUI epic P3 plan; the P3 plan describes a `set_tasks` tool. `TaskItem` + `TaskState` are already in Metrics.swift. Must be wired into `registerStandardTools` in Config.swift (line 235) when re-derived.
  - runTUISession in Acode.swift — was added by the TUI epic but isn't in the current pre-P0 HEAD. The /plan/orchestrate path needs it back.
  - Reverted tests (RendererTests, ToolsTests/ToolsRuntimeTests, ApprovalTests, ApprovalPolicyTests, OrchestratorTests, AgentTests, OneShotTests) were at pre-P0 in the recovery commit — most have been mechanically updated for the post-P0 seam in recovery(2/5), but a final pass is needed when the TUI files are re-introduced to ensure none of the TUI-only types (e.g. a future `TUISink.approve` test) regressed.

BLOCKS: nothing in the GUI effort (Phase 2 builds on the engine baseline without needing the TUI). The TUI is a separate, opt-in surface.

ACCEPTANCE: `swift build` green, `swift test` green with the previously-excluded files COMPILED AND EXECUTING, no exclusions remain in Package.swift, and the TUI flag (`--tui`) re-enters `run()` from Acode.swift as it did pre-incident.
acceptance_criteria: (1) Package.swift has zero entries in either `exclude:` array. (2) `swift build` is green with all 16+1 files compiled. (3) `swift test` is green; `GUISinkTests` runs and passes alongside the rest. (4) The TUI flag (`--tui` in Acode.swift) is back, gated on the TTY/alt-screen capability check from Capabilities.swift. (5) No new compile warnings; no engine file reintroduces a sync `approve` (post-P0 seam is preserved).
